arts.ttl: Guardiola admits City lack fear factor as Walker completes loan to Milan
arts.sum: Manager says top-four slot this season would be success Kyle Walker says goodbye to fans of ‘incredible club’ Pep Guardiola has admitted Manchester City have lost their fear factor and need to “recover who we are” but backed his team to challenge for honours next season, while Kyle Walker’s loan move to Milan was confirmed. The reigning Premier League champions are fifth in the table and 12 points behind the leaders, Liverpool, before Saturday’s visit of Chelsea after a dismal first half of their title defence. City defeated Chelsea on the opening day of the season at Stamford Bridge but that accounts for one of only two victories over teams in the top nine, the other being a 3-0 home win against Nottingham Forest. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: AC Milan Pressing for Bologna’s Riccardo Orsolini
arts.sum: Milan are stepping up their efforts to strengthen the squad after the recent acquisition of Kyle Walker, with a keen focus on bolstering the attacking options. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the club have set their sights on Bologna's winger Riccardo Orsolini. The post AC Milan Pressing for Bologna’s Riccardo Orsolini appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: The 34-year-old informed City of his wish to leave the club earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker breaks silence on Man City exit as AC Milan loan move confirmed

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker grateful for Manchester City 'dream' after sealing AC Milan loan move
arts.sum: The right-back departs for Italy until the end of the season after requesting a move away from the club he joined in 2017

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Man City captain Kyle Walker completes AC Milan transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City captain Kyle Walker has joined AC Milan on loan until the end of the season.
